calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To Crc 3.770
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANDREW CARO's Motion To Dismiss Entire Action Pursuant To Crc 3.770.

Plaintiff Andrew Caro's unopposed Motion Entire Action Pursuant To CRC 3.770 is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court orders the case dismissed as follows: (1) Plaintiff's representative PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice; (3) Plaintiff's individual PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice; (3) Plaintiff's class claims are dismissed without prejudice; (4) Plaintiff's individual (non) PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
